story.text:
# ✨ Weave Cousin
**📚(source) → 🧵 → 🕸️(weaver.archon.social) → 🪡**
*genitrix · weaving · V28*

Cross-forge weave. GenitriX maps source artifacts into the cousin lattice through the Spell Weaver.

> Two forges, one weave. The Spell Weaver does not own the cloth; it shows the warp and the weft.

*Keywords:* weave · cousin · spell-weaver · v28
